3261260.name: Two Falls (Nishu Takuatshina) Demo
3261260.description: Dive into the immersive world of Two Falls (Nishu Takuatshina) with our demo, featuring two captivating scenes. Step into the shoes of Jeanne, a young French woman navigating the unfamiliar lands of Canada, and Maikan, an Indigenous man whose life is deeply intertwined with the forest. Explore their contrasting perspectives, rich with cultural depth and emotional complexity, as you uncover the stories that bind them. This demo offers a glimpse into a beautifully crafted narrative experience where every choice shapes the journey.
3261260.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
